htmlStart:
<html lang="en" style="font-size: 1rem;"><head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Lumber Linq</title>
    <base href="/">
    <!-- <link id="theme-link" rel="stylesheet" href="assets/themes/bootstrap4-light-blue/theme.css" /> -->

    <!-- <script src="https://checkout.razorpay.com/v1/checkout.js"></script> -->
    <!-- <script type="text/javascript" src="https://checkout.razorpay.com/v1/razorpay.js"></script> -->
    <!-- Razorpay removed — Cashfree SDK is loaded lazily via CashfreePaymentService -->
    <!-- <script src="https://checkout.razorpay.com/v1/checkout.js"></script> -->
    <script src="https://challenges.cloudflare.com/turnstile/v0/api.js" async="" defer=""></script>

    <!-- <base href="https://storage.googleapis.com/sgn-ng-packing-list-app/"> -->
    <!-- <script src="https://js.stripe.com/v3/"></script> -->
    <!-- <link id="theme-css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="assets/layout/styles/theme/lara-light-indigo/theme.css"> -->

    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <!-- <meta name="viewport" content="user-scalable=no, initial-scale=1, maximum-scale=1, minimum-scale=1, width=device-width, viewport-fit=cover"> -->

    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <meta property="og:title" content="Lumberlinq - Your Digital Partner in Timber Business">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Lumberlinq: Revolutionizing Timber Business with digital solutions for measurement, loading, calculations, and packing lists.">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:url" content="https://www.lumberlinq.com/">
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://app-vps.rikexim.com/assets/images/logo.png">

    <script>
      if (typeof global === "undefined") {
        var global = window;
      }
    </script>
    <!-- Google tag: loaded with consent denied by default; app cookie settings update consent after Angular boots. -->
    <script>
      window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
      function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
      gtag('consent', 'default', {
        analytics_storage: 'denied',
        ad_storage: 'denied',
        ad_user_data: 'denied',
        ad_personalization: 'denied'
      });
      gtag('js', new Date());
      gtag('config', 'G-7TN9PBHZEF', { anonymize_ip: true });
    </script>
    <script id="ll-google-analytics" async="" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-7TN9PBHZEF"></script>
    <!-- <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';"> -->
    <!-- <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';"> -->

    <!-- <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src *; style-src * 'unsafe-inline'; script-src * 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval';"> -->
    <!-- <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';"> -->

    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="favicon-32.png">
    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="16x16" href="favicon-16.png">
    <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="favicon.ico">

    <link id="app-theme" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="/assets/themes/lara-light-blue/theme.css">
    <!-- Restore saved theme before Angular boots to prevent flash of wrong theme -->
    <script>
      (function () {
        try {
          var saved = localStorage.getItem('theme');
          if (saved) {
            var link = document.getElementById('app-theme');
            if (link) link.setAttribute('href', saved.replace(/^\//, ''));
          }
        } catch (e) {}
      })();
    </script>

  <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css"><style>

.tms-support-fab[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  position: fixed;
  

  bottom: 1.5rem;
  right: 1.5rem;
  z-index: 9000;
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1 0%, #8b5cf6 100%);
  color: #fff;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.45);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.tms-support-fab[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]:hover {
  transform: scale(1.12);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.55);
}
.tms-fab-badge[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  position: absolute;
  top: -5px;
  right: -5px;
  background: #ef4444;
  color: #fff;
  border-radius: 50%;
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  font-size: .65rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 2px solid #fff;
  line-height: 1;
}

.route-shell[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  min-height: 60vh;
  position: relative;
  display: block;
  overflow: visible;
  width: 100%;
}






main[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  min-width: 0;
}

.route-shell[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]    > router-outlet[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]    + *[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  display: block;
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
}

.route-shell[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]:not(.dashboard-active)   app-dashboard-new[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  display: none !important;
}



.global-page-loader[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 9999;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  pointer-events: all;
}





.global-page-loader.ng-animating[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  pointer-events: none;
}

.gpl-backdrop[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);
  backdrop-filter: blur(3px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(3px);
}

.gpl-card[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1.25rem;
  padding: 2.5rem 3rem;
  border-radius: 1.25rem;
  background: var(--surface-card, #ffffff);
  box-shadow:
    0 24px 64px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28),
    0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  min-width: 220px;
  animation: _ngcontent-ng-c3305219393_gplCardPop 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) both;
}

@keyframes _ngcontent-ng-c3305219393_gplCardPop {
  from { transform: scale(0.88); opacity: 0; }
  to   { transform: scale(1);    opacity: 1; }
}

.gpl-logo[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  height: 2.25rem;
  object-fit: contain;
  opacity: 0.85;
}

  .gpl-spinner {
  width: 3.5rem !important;
  height: 3.5rem !important;
}

  .gpl-spinner .p-progress-spinner-circle {
  stroke: #40916c !important;
  animation: p-progress-spinner-dash 1.5s ease-in-out infinite,
             _ngcontent-ng-c3305219393_gplSpinnerColor 6s ease-in-out infinite !important;
}

@keyframes _ngcontent-ng-c3305219393_gplSpinnerColor {
  0%   { stroke: #40916c; }
  33%  { stroke: #52b788; }
  66%  { stroke: #2d6a4f; }
  100% { stroke: #40916c; }
}

.gpl-text[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.8125rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--text-color-secondary, #6c757d);
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  animation: _ngcontent-ng-c3305219393_gplDots 1.4s steps(4, end) infinite;
}

@keyframes _ngcontent-ng-c3305219393_gplDots {
  0%   { content: 'Loading'; }
  25%  { opacity: 0.7; }
  50%  { opacity: 0.5; }
  75%  { opacity: 0.7; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }
}



.cookie-consent[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  position: fixed;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: 1.25rem;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  z-index: 26000;
  width: min(680px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1.25rem;
  padding: .875rem 1.25rem;
  background: var(--surface-card, #ffffff);
  border: 1px solid var(--surface-border, rgba(0,0,0,.1));
  border-radius: 1rem;
  box-shadow:
    0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,.07),
    0 20px 50px -10px rgba(0,0,0,.18),
    0 0 0 1px rgba(99,102,241,.08);
  animation: _ngcontent-ng-c3305219393_cookieFadeUp .35s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1) both;
}

.cookie-consent[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  border-radius: inherit;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(99,102,241,.04) 0%, transparent 60%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

@keyframes _ngcontent-ng-c3305219393_cookieFadeUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(1.5rem) scale(.97); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0)       scale(1);   }
}

.cookie-icon[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 2.5rem;
  height: 2.5rem;
  border-radius: .75rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1 0%, #8b5cf6 100%);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  color: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(99,102,241,.35);
}

.cookie-copy[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: .2rem;
  min-width: 0;
}

.cookie-copy[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]   strong[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  font-size: .85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-color, #1e293b);
  letter-spacing: -.01em;
}

.cookie-copy[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]   span[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393], 
.cookie-preference-row[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]   p[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: .775rem;
  color: var(--text-color-secondary, #64748b);
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.cookie-actions[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .5rem;
}

.cookie-actions[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]   .p-button[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  font-size: .8rem !important;
  padding: .45rem .9rem !important;
  border-radius: .6rem !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
}



.cookie-preference-row[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1.25rem;
  padding: .875rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--surface-border, #f1f5f9);
}

.cookie-preference-row[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.cookie-pref-info[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]   strong[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  font-size: .875rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-color, #1e293b);
}

.cookie-pref-info[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]   p[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  margin-top: .2rem;
}

.cookie-gdpr-dialog-note[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  background: var(--surface-ground);
  border: 1px solid var(--surface-border);
  border-left: 3px solid #6366f1;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: .6rem .85rem;
  font-size: .8rem;
  color: var(--text-color-secondary);
}

.cookie-privacy-link[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
  color: #6366f1;
  text-decoration: underline;
  font-size: inherit;
}

[_nghost-ng-c3305219393]     .cookie-dialog {
  width: 90vw;
  max-width: 460px;
}

[_nghost-ng-c3305219393]     .cookie-dialog .p-dialog-content {
  padding-top: .5rem;
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .cookie-consent[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: stretch;
    padding: 1rem;
    bottom: .75rem;
  }

  .cookie-icon[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] { display: none; }

  .cookie-actions[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .cookie-actions[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393]   .p-button[_ngcontent-ng-c3305219393] {
    width: 100% !important;
    justify-content: center;
  }
}

/*# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,
